required_checks: planning inventory source hashes match
64-candidate dual-docking pilot manifest is frozen before execution
64/64 pilot candidates satisfy DG-A completeness and 16 replicate candidates pass reproducibility gates
independent 8X6B and independent 9E6Y docking provenance is present for every new DG-A row
DG-C rows have zero formal-training weight and cannot enter the formal test
prospective open-development count is 820 and calibration-only count is 107
formal blinded manifest contains exactly 160 candidates from 16 untouched parent clusters
open/formal overlap is zero for parent cluster, exact sequence, and CDR3 >=80% cluster
known-positive and derived-neighborhood rows are calibration-only and absent from the submission pool
known-positive sequence similarity is absent from model features
generic_binding_prior and cheap_qc_score are absent from the P2 docking head inputs
five-fold parent-group cross-validation and all registered shortcut baselines are complete before formal unseal
three exact seeds 83, 89, and 97 produce checkpoints and label-blind formal predictions
positive-family leave-one-out diagnostics and strict-pair concordance are reported
generic contact/paratope replay retention is reported per seed
formal evaluator defines the true-positive class as the sealed R_gold top quintile
precision@20%, recall@30%, NDCG, R_gold Spearman, parent-cluster bootstrap, and paired permutation are reported
label-shuffle null cannot pass the primary gate
artifact manifest binds protocol, receptors, restraints, manifests, label builder, model config, checkpoints, predictions, preregistration, and evaluator hashes
claim boundary remains computational docking gold rather than experimental binding or blocking truth
formal_fail_policy: Do not deploy the P2 model for docking-budget allocation; retain real docking plus governed baselines and exploration quota.
formal_pass_policy: Model may allocate frontscreen docking budget under the registered 70/15/15 policy; real docking remains the final competition authority.
known_limitations: PVRIG is a fixed target, so P2 is not a cross-antigen target-conditioned model.
Known positives remain few and support calibration/anchor diagnostics rather than ordinary large-sample classification.
DG-B Teacher500 labels use 9E6Y rescoring rather than independent 9E6Y docking and therefore carry half weight.
Even DG-A docking is a computational gold standard and not experimental truth.
